---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "Epic: [Short description]"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Explain the problem or need this feature addresses. Who will benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of how you think the feature should work.

## Benefits
What are the expected benefits of implementing this feature?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
